name: FF_COMPILED_INFO
description: This table contains compiled versions of user-defined formulas.

columns.Name: FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the compiled formula. Foreign key to FF_FORMULAS.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: FDIU_ENTRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of formula data item usage entries for the formula in FF_FDI_USAGES.

columns.Name: SELECT_STATEMENT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of separate SELECT statements in the executable code.

columns.Name: TEXT_LENGTH
columns.Comments: Length (in characters) of the program.

columns.Name: COMPILED_TEXT
columns.Comments: The program that represents the user formula.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Validity status. A status other than V means that the formula needs to be recompiled.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: PLSQL_CREATED
columns.Comments: Flag whether or not  formula PLSQL has been created.

columns.Name: PACKAGE_NAME
columns.Comments: The compiled formula PLSQL package name.

columns.Name: PACKAGE_HEADER
columns.Comments: Formula PLSQL package header text.

columns.Name: PACKAGE_BODY
columns.Comments: Formula PLSQL package body text.

columns.Name: PLSQL_ERRORS
columns.Comments: Errors in creating formula PLSQL.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: COMPILE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the formula compile.

columns.Name: ORA_EDITION_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: Indicates the edition based redefinition (EBR) context to which the row belongs - either 'ALL', ''SET1' or 'SET2'.
